name: feat: Responsive carousel — CoverFlow Desktop + Scale Center Mobile

tasks.name: Reorder carousel images in HTML (items 6-8)
tasks.acceptance: grep -n 'preview-' index.html | head -8 | awk -F: '{print NR, $2}' | grep -q 'create-post.*weekend-plan.*plan-list' && echo PASS || (echo 'Expected order: ...create-post, weekend-plan, plan-list' && exit 1)

tasks.name: Update carousel.css — remove scroll-snap, conditional perspective
tasks.acceptance: ! grep -q 'scroll-snap' assets/css/carousel.css && ! grep -q 'overflow-x' assets/css/carousel.css && grep -q 'perspective: 3000px' assets/css/carousel.css && grep -q 'perspective: none' assets/css/carousel.css && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Refactor carousel.js — Scale Center positions + remove scroll-snap logic
tasks.acceptance: ! grep -q 'initScrollMode\|destroyScrollMode\|scrollToIndex\|isScrollMode\|cloneFirst\|cloneLast' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'POSITIONS_SCALE_CENTER' assets/js/carousel.js && grep -q 'scale-center' assets/js/carousel.js && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.name: Update Playwright tests — remove scroll-snap tests, add Scale Center tests
tasks.acceptance: ! grep -q 'scroll-snap active\|items are static\|item width ~75%\|scroll-behavior is smooth\|arrows hidden\|clones exist' tests/visual/carousel-mobile.spec.js && grep -q 'scale-center' tests/visual/carousel-mobile.spec.js && grep -q 'coverflow' tests/visual/carousel-mobile.spec.js && echo PASS || echo FAIL
